_comment: Template de locales i18n para o meta-harness. Idiomas: en, pt-BR, es. Copie para internal/i18n/locales/<lang>.json (backend) ou i18n/locales/<lang>.json (frontend) e ajuste as mensagens. Convenção de chaves: <domínio>.<ação>.<contexto>. Interpolação Go: {{.var}} | Interpolação Nuxt: {{ var }}

validation.min_length: Field {{.field}} must be at least {{.min}} characters
validation.max_length: Field {{.field}} must be at most {{.max}} characters

auth.account_locked: Your account has been locked. Contact support.
auth.account_not_verified: Please verify your email before signing in.
auth.token_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

user.delete_blocked: Cannot delete user with active sessions

error.internal: Internal server error. Please try again later.
error.forbidden: You don't have permission to access this resource
error.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes.
error.maintenance: Service is under maintenance. Please try again later.
error.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

home.subtitle: Manage your account in one place
